text: މިހާރު މިކުރަނީ ކިއެއް
author: ސަމާ މިސް

text: I have measured out my life with coffee spoons.
author: T.S. Eliot

text: Monsters are real, and ghosts are real too. They live inside us.
author: Stephen King

text: Normal is an illusion. What is normal for the spider is chaos for the fly.
author: Charles Addams

text: I became insane, with long intervals of horrible sanity.
author: Edgar Allan Poe

text: The darker the night, the brighter the stars.
author: Fyodor Dostoevsky

text: We are all broken, that's how the light gets in.
author: Ernest Hemingway
